cors_config.vulnerability: Regex uses https? — trusts both HTTP and HTTPS subdomains

attack_chain: 1. Exploit server redirects victim to stock subdomain with XSS payload in productId
2. XSS fires on http://stock subdomain (trusted by main site CORS policy)
3. Injected JS makes credentialed XHR to main site /accountDetails
4. Main site sees trusted subdomain origin → returns victim API key
5. Stolen key exfiltrated to attacker log server
